# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
import math

def main():
    Sx, Sy = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())
    Tx, Ty = map(int, sys.stdin.readline().split())

    # Convert to tile coordinates
    def to_tile(x):
        return x // 2

    # Starting and target tile coordinates
    start_tile = (to_tile(Sx), to_tile(Sy))
    target_tile = (to_tile(Tx), to_tile(Ty))

    # Number of tiles crossed in x and y directions
    dx = abs(target_tile[0] - start_tile[0])
    dy = abs(target_tile[1] - start_tile[1])

    # Total toll is the number of tiles crossed
    print(dx + dy)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
